skill_name: Manage Bookmarks Reading List And Shortcuts
overview: Use bookmark dialogs, bookmark folders, reading-list entries, and shortcut editing surfaces to save pages and verify that the bookmark or reading-list result is visible.
when_to_use: Saving a page into bookmarks or reading list
Choosing or creating a bookmark folder
Verifying that the bookmark or reading-list entry is present
preconditions: Chrome is on the page that should be saved.

atomic_capabilities.name: reach_surface
atomic_capabilities.purpose: Reach the relevant Chrome surface for manage bookmarks reading list and shortcuts

atomic_capabilities.name: execute_and_verify
atomic_capabilities.purpose: Execute manage bookmarks reading list and shortcuts and verify the requested result state

decision_guide.condition: The correct Chrome surface is not open yet.
decision_guide.reason: Surface errors cause benchmark failures before the core action can start.

decision_guide.condition: The main interaction already ran but completion is still uncertain.
decision_guide.reason: This skill is only complete when the requested visible result state is present.

when_to_use: save pages into bookmarks or reading list, choose folders, and verify the saved item or shortcut target

states.visual_grounding: Relevant controls on bookmark dialogs, reading list entries, bookmark folders, and shortcut editing surfaces
states.trigger_condition: The workflow still needs to save pages into bookmarks or reading list, choose folders, and verify the saved item or shortcut target
states.action: Advance Chrome through the `open_bookmark_or_shortcut_surface` subgoal until the bookmark, folder, reading-list item, or shortcut tile is visibly present.
states.text_description: State `open_bookmark_or_shortcut_surface` belongs to the Chrome workflow for save pages into bookmarks or reading list, choose folders, and verify the saved item or shortcut target.

key_frame.annotation_note: Open the bookmark save surface from the current page.

highlight_targets.name: Bookmark save control
highlight_targets.annotation_query: Bookmark star or save control in the Chrome toolbar

states.visual_grounding: Relevant controls on bookmark dialogs, reading list entries, bookmark folders, and shortcut editing surfaces
states.trigger_condition: The workflow still needs to save pages into bookmarks or reading list, choose folders, and verify the saved item or shortcut target
states.action: Advance Chrome through the `choose_destination` subgoal until the bookmark, folder, reading-list item, or shortcut tile is visibly present.
states.text_description: State `choose_destination` belongs to the Chrome workflow for save pages into bookmarks or reading list, choose folders, and verify the saved item or shortcut target.

highlight_targets.name: Edit bookmark dialog
highlight_targets.annotation_query: Edit bookmark dialog with folder selector

states.visual_grounding: Relevant controls on bookmark dialogs, reading list entries, bookmark folders, and shortcut editing surfaces
states.trigger_condition: The workflow still needs to save pages into bookmarks or reading list, choose folders, and verify the saved item or shortcut target
states.action: Advance Chrome through the `save_item` subgoal until the bookmark, folder, reading-list item, or shortcut tile is visibly present.
states.text_description: State `save_item` belongs to the Chrome workflow for save pages into bookmarks or reading list, choose folders, and verify the saved item or shortcut target.

key_frame.annotation_note: Create or confirm the requested bookmark folder.

highlight_targets.name: New bookmark folder control
highlight_targets.annotation_query: Bookmark dialog control for creating or confirming the target folder

states.visual_grounding: Relevant controls on bookmark dialogs, reading list entries, bookmark folders, and shortcut editing surfaces
states.trigger_condition: The workflow still needs to save pages into bookmarks or reading list, choose folders, and verify the saved item or shortcut target
states.action: Advance Chrome through the `verify_saved_item` subgoal until the bookmark, folder, reading-list item, or shortcut tile is visibly present.
states.text_description: State `verify_saved_item` belongs to the Chrome workflow for save pages into bookmarks or reading list, choose folders, and verify the saved item or shortcut target.

key_frame.annotation_note: Verify the saved-state outcome after bookmarking.

highlight_targets.name: Saved bookmark state
highlight_targets.annotation_query: Visible page or bookmark state indicating the bookmark action completed
